Everything your business needs to grow online

From your first website to AI automations that handle customers while you sleep — we build the full digital stack, tailored to AP & Telangana businesses.

Pricing

Plans that fit your budget and your goals

Transparent pricing, no hidden costs. Every plan is built around getting your business real results.

Choose Starter
Most popular
Growth
For businesses ready to market themselves and convert more leads.

One-time project cost
  • Everything in Starter
  • Up to 10-page custom website
  • AI chat assistant integration
  • Full technical & local SEO
  • 1 month social media setup
  • 2–3 week delivery
Choose Growth
Enterprise
Full custom platforms, automation, and ongoing marketing support.
₹40K+
Scoped to your project
  • Everything in Growth
  • Custom web app / portal
  • Advanced AI automation & workflows
  • Dedicated account manager

  • 4–6 week delivery

Questions

Frequently asked questions

How much does a website cost?

Our plans range from ₹10,000–₹15,000 for a Starter site, ₹20,000–₹25,000 for Growth, and ₹40,000+ for fully custom Enterprise platforms — depending on features, pages, and AI integration needed.

Do you only work with businesses in Visakhapatnam?

No — while we're based in Visakhapatnam, we actively serve clients across Vizianagaram, Srikakulam, and throughout Andhra Pradesh and Telangana, with remote onboarding and support.

What does "AI integration" actually include?

Depending on your plan, this can mean an AI chat receptionist on your site, automated email/WhatsApp replies, smart appointment booking, or custom automation workflows — all designed to help your business work smartly.

How long does it take to launch?

Starter sites typically launch in 7–10 days, Growth plans in 2–3 weeks, and Enterprise builds in 4–6 weeks depending on complexity.

Will my site show up on Google search?

Every website we build includes on-page and technical SEO fundamentals — fast load speed, proper structure, and schema markup — plus local SEO targeting for your city and region.

Ready to work smartly with AI?

Tell us about your business and we'll recommend the right plan — no pressure, just a clear next step.
